title: Soak Test  - Headset connected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: App remains stable and headset stays connected after prolonged idle soak test with app in background
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth headset with the app.
4. Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
5. Leave the phone idle for multiple hours (e.g., overnight).
expected: App remains stable, responsive, and the headset stays connected throughout the idle period.
